blocks.code:
(define (memo f)
  (let ((cache (list)))
    (lambda (n)
      (let ((hit (assoc n cache)))
        (if hit (cdr hit)
            (let ((result (f n)))
              (set! cache (cons (cons n result) cache))
              result))))))

(define fib
  (memo (lambda (n)
    (if (< n 2) n
        (+ (fib (- n 1)) (fib (- n 2)))))))

(map fib (range 0 20))

        (if hit (cdr hit)
            (let ((result (f n)))
              (set! cache (cons (cons n result) cache))
              result))))))

(define fib
